fixed_during_qa.summary: Stopped generating a guessed public Chrome Web Store URL from extension ID alone and gated Add to Chrome on published status plus real URL.
Pricing copy now clearly states 10 free fills, $19 one-time, and no subscription.
Root README wording no longer describes the repo as a private repository.

warnings.summary: Security scan still reports review-level keyword references in docs, examples, archived factory material, and templates, but no high-severity secret exposure was found.
Local browser QA used placeholder public Supabase values, so checkout-start auth redirect was validated by code and smoke rather than a live local login session.

notes: Legal pages are present and formal.
Success page does not locally unlock Pro.
Store CTA now respects unpublished state.
